detail.title: GOLFTEINER · MODEL 1
detail.desc: Modular golf container simulator. 4K short-throw projection, impact screen 3660×2110, rooftop deck lounge. Built as a product — replicable, sellable, licensable, franchisable.

detail.title: DYNAMIC PUTTING LAB · VICE P1
detail.desc: Dual-axis motion platform with dynamic slope, real-time data and immersive visual feedback. 1 real hole + unlimited virtual.

detail.title: OUTDOOR PUTTING GREEN · ZONE 07
detail.desc: 16.63m² tour-grade outdoor green, 6 holes, layered turf/sand/base/drainage build. Not the Lab — the real-grass complement.

detail.title: PERFORMANCE DNA
detail.desc: Your 5-axis golf radar built from real rounds: Driver, Irons, Short Game, Putting, Mental.

detail.title: GOLF HOUSE · BUSINESS
detail.desc: Self-managed Golf House Simulator. Hourly sim rental, memberships, coaching, data sessions, events. Pioneer in its zone.
